# Daily Report — 2026-07-22

## Task Completed
Exposed three already-implemented tools to the packages that were missing them:
- Added `update_request` and `update_request_item` to the `service_desk` package so desk agents can modify service requests and request items without needing the `full` package.
- Removed the `# TODO: not yet implemented` comment for `delete_catalog_item_variable` in both the `catalog_builder` and `full` packages; the tool has been implemented since 2026-04-09 and was simply never un-commented in the package config.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2374
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
- ruff: all checks passed
- pip-audit: 4 findings in system packages (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) — pre-existing, not introduced by this change; no project-owned vulnerabilities

## Files Changed
- `config/tool_packages.yaml`
- `.github/DAILY_BACKLOG.md`
- `.github/daily-reports/2026-07-22.md`
